title: aster laevis var. cyaneus
intro: Aster laevis var. cyaneus, also known as the Smooth Blue Aster, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aster laevis var. cyaneus include reducing pain and inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers and steeping them in hot water.
